meta.title: Classification of Leptospires of the Pyrogenes Serogroup Isolated from Cattle in Zimbabwe by Cross-Agglutinin Absorption and Restriction Fragment Length Polymorphism Analysis
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: Five strains of the genus Leptospira belonging to serogroup Pyrogenes were isolated from cattle slaughtered in Zimbabwe and subjected to cross-agglutinin absorption and restriction fragment length polymorphism analysis. One strain, SBF 2, represents a new genetic strain of serovar kwale, while another strain, SBF 49, is a new genetic strain closely related to serovar nigeria. Three strains belong to a new serovar for which the name mombe with reference strain SBF 20 is proposed. Restriction fragment length polymorphism analysis indicated that each of these three strains represents a different restriction polymorphism pattern group.
